title: Missing option for disable the email notification type "someone requests to join your team"
excerpt:
Hello, 
as owner of many teams i want do disable the email notifications for “someone requests to join your team”. There is no option available for disabling this type of notification under “my profile”> “notifications”. …

posts.author: rebl (René B.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
as owner of many teams i want do disable the email notifications for “someone requests to join your team”. There is no option available for disabling this type of notification under “my profile”> “notifications”.
I have already asked the monday.com support, but they said that this option is currently missing and i can rise a feature request for this.
Thanks!
BR
